package_info:
Name: data-plotter
Version: 0.5.0
Summary: Data visualization library
License: MIT
Requires-Python: >=3.9
Modules: data_plotter
Optional dependencies: matplotlib (for advanced plots)
Key functions: plot_bar(), plot_line(), export_csv()
analysis: Data visualization package. Main module: data_plotter. Core functions work without optional deps. Advanced plotting requires matplotlib (optional). Key functions: plot_bar(data) -> Figure, plot_line(data) -> Figure, export_csv(data, path) -> None.
jira_context: Create probe tests for data-plotter. Note: matplotlib is an optional dependency.
